user.name: Jonah S
comment:
All moves except last two. 
For start:
Get heel early on flat ledge, dynamically thruch to side pull. Keep heel on flat ledge but cam it against wall. Go up right hand to bad pinch, aiming for thumb catch. Cam right heel harder and bump left hand to ok pebble, cam heel even harder and bump to really good pebble. 

From there slide right foot to slightly higher block, and statically reach to crimp with thumb catch. Make sure you use the right side of the crimp and use the thumb. Bear down, get high left foot and rock up to the ticked crimp. Pr9bably just bump left hand after that. 

Stunning boulder.
